text_block_list.text:
The day of Gold City's debut finally arrives. As we
head to the track...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: City! Look this way!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Do you have anything to say about your
upcoming debut?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Cityyyy! Good luuuuck!

The airport is abuzz with reporters and fans
gathered to see her.
choice_data_list:
Sorry, but I'm going to have to ask you to give
her some space.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on! The world is dying to know what this supermodel is up to!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
All her fans have been looking forward to this! At
least give us a word or two to share with—

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Then promise me you'll write exactly what I'm
going to say.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Watch me as a runner.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'll show everyone I'm more than just looks.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Waaahhh! So cooool!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
The... definition of cool. Okay—just one picture
to match your message for the front page!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Ah, her determination only accentuates her
beauty! I have to get a good shot of her face
while she's running!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
They're still not looking past my appearance. But,
well, that's the only card I've played so far, so
what else can you expect?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Still, they won't be talking like that forever. I
have to prove myself, and quickly!
choice_data_list: Just try not to get too tensed up.
Just try not to get too tensed up.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Why should I relax when I'm supposed to give it
my all?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'll surprise them by running so fast they won't
have the chance to see my face!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's that supposed to mean?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that, like, a given? I'm running to be who I
am.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm a runner, through and through. I'll show them
that today!
